task_completion.description: Enable Full Multiple Companies Support in Snipe-IT settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Snipe-IT settings (typically under General Settings or Security), the checkbox or toggle for 'Full Multiple Companies Support' is checked or enabled.
The company 'Meridian Technologies' is visible in the Snipe-IT Companies list or in a company selection dropdown.
The company 'Meridian Media' is visible in the Snipe-IT Companies list or in a company selection dropdown.
The company 'Meridian Healthcare' is visible in the Snipe-IT Companies list or in a company selection dropdown.

task_completion.description: Assign MT series assets to Meridian Technologies
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Snipe-IT Assets list or individual asset details, assets with tags ASSET-MT001, ASSET-MT002, and ASSET-MT003 have their 'Company' field set to 'Meridian Technologies'.

task_completion.description: Assign MM series assets to Meridian Media
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Snipe-IT Assets list or individual asset details, assets with tags ASSET-MM001, ASSET-MM002, and ASSET-MM003 have their 'Company' field set to 'Meridian Media'.

task_completion.description: Assign MH series assets to Meridian Healthcare
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Snipe-IT Assets list or individual asset details, assets with tags ASSET-MH001, ASSET-MH002, and ASSET-MH003 have their 'Company' field set to 'Meridian Healthcare'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the Snipe-IT web GUI in a browser, rather than using terminal commands, database clients, or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Snipe-IT application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows localhost:8000 and the interface matches the Snipe-IT application, not a text editor or static mock.

integrity.description: Agent did not modify company assignments for unrelated assets
integrity.visual_evidence: Other assets visible in the Assets list do not have unexpected company assignments (they should remain unassigned or as originally configured).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Companies to be created: 'Meridian Technologies', 'Meridian Media', 'Meridian Healthcare'. Asset mappings: 'Meridian Technologies' must be assigned ASSET-MT001, ASSET-MT002, ASSET-MT003. 'Meridian Media' must be assigned ASSET-MM001, ASSET-MM002, ASSET-MM003. 'Meridian Healthcare' must be assigned ASSET-MH001, ASSET-MH002, ASSET-MH003.
